g.text: TopoRec-Family: Adaptive Reasoning Topology for Candidate-Aware LLM Recommendation
A minimal-input reranking protocol: topology changes the organization of evidence, not the available information.
recommendation loss or NDCG reward + router oracle/regret supervision + cost regularization + optional verifier/reward-only item-attribute graph
graph/verifier resources are not assumed as default online prompt inputs
